title: VoteMission
description: An addon that brings a Voting mission
body:
# Introduction
This is a [Create: Missions](https://modrinth.com/mod/missions) addon.
Simply adds a Voting mission to the weekly pool.

![Voting mission in the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbf3c6a3e4babcd6c67a1e17bdea501e6f74dc28.png)

Fully configurable. Only server side mod.

# How to set up
- Install [Create: Missions](https://modrinth.com/mod/missions), [Votifier for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/votifier-for-fabric), and their dependencies
- Add [this mission config](https://github.com/Kryeit/VoteMission/blob/1.20/src/main/resources/config.json) to your `config/missions/missions.json` configuration file
- Get reassigned new missions, this mission will be one of the choices inside the mission pool
